pluginDescription: Broadcast WSJT-X-compatible UDP status, decodes, and logged QSOs, with safe optional remote requests.
targetsDesc: Third-party UDP servers that should receive WSJT-X-compatible datagrams.
localPortDesc: Local UDP port to bind. Use 0 for an ephemeral port.
clientIdDesc: Client identifier written into WSJT-X UDP packets. Use {operatorId} to include the operator id.
enableType5QsoLoggedDesc: Send the structured WSJT-X QSOLogged packet when a QSO completes.
enableType12LoggedAdifDesc: Send the WSJT-X binary LoggedADIF packet when a QSO completes.
enableType12Desc: Send a WSJT/JTDX UDP binary LoggedADIF packet when a QSO is completed.
type12HostDesc: UDP host or IP address for WSJT/JTDX LoggedADIF Type 12 packets.
type12PortDesc: UDP port for WSJT/JTDX LoggedADIF Type 12 packets. Default: 2237.
enableRawAdifDesc: Send a raw single-record ADIF datagram when a QSO is completed.
rawAdifHostDesc: UDP host or IP address for raw ADIF datagrams.
rawAdifPortDesc: UDP port for raw ADIF datagrams. Default: 2333.
udpClientIdDesc: Legacy client identifier written into WSJT/JTDX Type 12 packets.
allowReplyRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to start a reply to a matching CQ/QRZ decode.
allowHaltTxRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to stop automation or interrupt TX.
allowFreeTextRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to set or send free-text messages.
allowLocationRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to set a temporary session location/grid.
allowConfigureRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to apply supported runtime configuration fields.
allowCloseRequestsDesc: Allow third-party software to close the plugin UDP session.
allowSwitchConfigurationRequestsDesc: Allow SwitchConfiguration requests. Unsupported TX-5DR mappings are logged.
lowConfidenceThresholdDesc: Decode confidence below this value is marked low confidence in UDP Decode packets.
maxHighlightRulesDesc: Maximum active callsign highlight rules accepted from UDP.
